**![][image1]**

**RAW MATERIAL**

| CONTENT INFORMATION |  |  |  |  |  |
| :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- | :---- |
| **TITLE** | **GS 15 BUSINESS CASE COMPETITION'S REGISTRATION ON WEBSITE** |  |  |  |  |
| **PIC** |  |  | **DIVISION** | Event-Competition |  |
| **CONTENT DETAILS** |  |  |  |  |  |
| **TYPE** | Others | **CHANNEL** |  | Others |  |
| **RATIO** | Others | **SIZE & ORIENTATION** |  |  | SIZE: 4:5 ORIENTATION:Potrait |
| **UPLOAD DATE & TIME** (WIB) |  |  |  |  |  |

| THE CONTENT |  |  |
| :---: | ----- | ----- |
| **Slides** | **Copywriting** | **Notes/Contoh Visualisasi** |
| **1** | Choose a competition Business Case Competition Mini Case Competition (Tapi jangan diallow dl ya yg MCC selama masa regist BCC) | intinya 1 tim bcc 3-4 team member (including team leader ya) mcc 1-2 team member (bisa individual) Yg regist hrs team leader  |
| **1** | Buat BCC cuma bisa join as a team  Buat MCC (dibikin kayak ikon choose one gt) join as: individual/team If team (BCC) 1\. Team name 2\. Each team member’s full name (3-4 team member buat bcc)- formatnya kayak “Team Leader’s Name”, trus bawahnya “2nd Team Member’s Name”, “3rd Team Member’s Name”, dan “4th Team Member’s Name”. Yang 4th team member opsional aja 3\. University (each team member, krn bisa beda2 1 tim) 4\. Major (each team member, krn bisa beda2 1 tim) 5\. Email (each team member) 6\. Phone Number (connected to WhatsApp) (each team member) 7\. Instagram Account Username (each team member) If team (MCC) 1\. Team name 2\. Each team member’s full name (max 2 team member buat bcc). formatnya kayak “Team Leader’s Name”, trus bawahnya “2nd Team Member’s Name” 3\. University (each team member, krn bisa beda2 1 tim) 4\. Major (each team member, krn bisa beda2 1 tim) 5\. Email (each team member) 6\. Phone Number (connected to WhatsApp) (each team member) 7\. Instagram Account Username (each team member) If individual (buat mcc, soalnya mcc bisa join as individual jugaa) 1\. Full name 2\. University 3\. Major 4\. Email 5\. Phone number (connected to WhatsApp) 6\. Instagram Account Username |  |
| **1** | **klo bcc & mcc team** Compile into 1 PDF file containing each team member’s Student ID Card (KTM)/ proof of active undergraduate student status **Klo mcc (individual)** Upload your Student ID Card (KTM)/ proof of active undergraduate student status  |  |
| **1** | **BUAT BCC and**   Each participant must fulfill all of the registration requirements below: i. Repost the official poster via Instagram Story.   **(Bawahnya)** Compile into one (1) PDF file containing proof that all team members have reposted the official poster. ii. Share the official poster and broadcast to a minimum of five (5) group chats (WhatsApp, LINE, Telegram, etc.).  **(Bawahnya)** Compile into one (1) PDF file containing proof that all team members have shared the poster and broadcast to the required number of group chats. iii. Upload the official twibbon on Instagram, tag three (3) friends in the twibbon post, and tag @sxcgrandsummit and @studentsxceosbdg.  **(Bawahnya)** Compile into one (1) PDF file containing proof that all team members have uploaded the twibbon and followed the tagging requirements. iv. Follow the official Instagram accounts of StudentsXCEOs Bandung (@studentsxceosbdg) and StudentsXCEO Grand Summit (@sxcgrandsummit).  (**Bawahnya**) Compile into one (1) PDF file containing proof that all team members have followed both official Instagram accounts. v. Follow the official LinkedIn account of StudentsXCEO Grand Summit.  **(Bawahnya)** Compile into one (1) PDF file containing proof that all team members have followed the official LinkedIn account. NOTES: ini dibatesin masing2 persyaratan cuma bisa upload 1 file pdf aja. Krn sistemnya dicompile jadi 1 pdf)  Di paling atas boleh  drop guidebook jg yaa, bisa bikin semacam tombol “Guidebook” yg lgsg ngarah ke [bit.ly/GuidebookBCCGS15](http://bit.ly/GuidebookBCCGS15)  |  |
| **1** | Complete the payment by transferring the registration fee to the designated bank account, as stated in the guidebook. Upload the proof of payment below. Di paling atas boleh  drop guidebook jg yaa, bisa bikin semacam tombol “Guidebook” yg lgsg ngarah ke [bit.ly/GuidebookBCCGS15](http://bit.ly/GuidebookBCCGS15)  |  |
| **5** | tombol “submit registration” (Bikin kayak pop-up di atas gt setelah submit, “Your registration has been submitted. The committee will verify your registration shortly. Please check your email regularly for the confirmation message”)  |  |

| CAPTION |  |  |
